release_notes:
Security hardening and stability fixes.
- Socket.IO authentication bypass fixed: WebSocket connections now require a valid auth token.
- Auth token leakage in URLs prevented by removing tokens from upload response URLs.
- SSRF in update manifest validation mitigated with proper urlparse() validation and hostname allowlist.
- Timing attack on token comparison prevented with hmac.compare_digest() constant-time verification.
- Race condition in task callback cleanup resolved with safe task removal.
- Severity comparison logic corrected with explicit score mapping.
upgrade_notes:
Security-related fixes. No configuration changes required.
  1. WebSocket connections now require valid auth tokens — ensure your token is set.
  2. Auth token is no longer exposed in URLs — update any scripts that relied on URL-based tokens.
